title: Pen Megam Polave Lyrics Kathai Thiraikathai Vasanam Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Pen Megam Pola
Singer: GV Prakash, Saindhavi
Music: Sharreth
Lyricist: NA. Muthu Kumar
Movie: Kathai Thiraikathai Vasanam

Pen megam polave
nee enmel oorgiraai.
Un moga paarvayaal
naan neeraai aagiren.

Kulirndhida muththam thandhaai
mazhaiyena naanum veelndhaen.
Nuraiththidum kadalaai meendum
alaindhunnai thaedi vandhaen.

Pen megam polave
nee enmel oorgiraai.
Un moga paarvayaal
naan neeraai aagiren.

Vidyum munne unnai nilavaai naan rasippeney
kaniyum munnae ennai pariththaal naan silirppeney
adie ennai kedum swasak kaattru neeyadi
en kangal pesidum kadhaigal oraayiram
adhai sonnaal velveeney.. ...

Ven megam polave
nee enmel oorgiraai
Un moga paarvayaal
naan neeraai aagiren.

Azhagil ennai vendraai adadaa nee dhevadhayaa
anbil ennai kondraai ayyo nee raatchasiyaa
malar kollai polave manadhai kondu selgiraai
adhai kandu kolgayil kambi nee ennuvaai.

Ven megam polave
nee enmel oorgiraai.
Un moga paarvayaal
naan neeraai aagiren.

Kulirndhida muththam thandhaai
mazhaiyena naanum veelndhaen.
Nuraiththidum kadalaai meendum
alaindhunnai thaedi vandhaen.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Pen Megam Polave, the lyrics express deep feelings of love and affection, portraying a romantic connection between the singers. The song is set in a context where the characters are experiencing the beauty of love, making it an ideal backdrop for intimate moments in the film Kathai Thiraikathai Vasanam. The soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke emotions of warmth and nostalgia, making it a perfect choice for celebrations of love. Overall, it encapsulates the essence of romance, making it relatable to anyone who has experienced love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pen Megam Polave is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance and longing. With the enchanting voices of GV Prakash Kumar and Saindhavi, this song from the film Kathai Thiraikathai Vasanam takes listeners on a heartfelt journey. The melodious composition by Shareth combined with Na Muthukumar's poignant lyrics makes it a must-listen for all lovers of Tamil music.
stanzaMeanings: You are like a cloud, hovering over me. With your beautiful gaze, I become like water.
You gave me a cool kiss like rain, and I got lost in it. I searched for you again, like the sea that swells.
With music, love blooms, GVaakkum and saidhaviye.
You are like a cloud, hovering over me. With your beautiful gaze, I become like water.
Before the light, I will taste you like the moon. If you look at me, I will smile. The gentle breeze that comes will tell a thousand stories, if I say it, I will win...
You are like a cloud, hovering over me. With your beautiful gaze, I become like water.
Oh, you are beautiful, like a goddess. You embraced me with love. Oh, are you a demon? You take my heart away like a flower, and I see you as a thread in my heart.
We don't need to let go.
You are like a cloud, hovering over me. With your beautiful gaze, I become like water.
You gave me a cool kiss like rain, and I got lost in it. I searched for you again, like the sea that swells.
With music, love blooms, GVaakkum and saidhaviye.
